display_information.name: Virtual Org
display_information.description: Founder-facing control surface for the AI Venture Studio control plane.
display_information.long_description: Virtual Org is the founder-facing Slack agent for the AI Venture Studio control plane. It helps the founder see what is blocked, review approvals, inspect task status, request a briefing, and trigger one safe worker pass while the real state, safety rules, and automation continue to live in the backend control plane and OpenClaw.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Founder-facing assistant for checking blockers, approvals, task status, and safe worker actions in the Virtual Org control plane.
